Hero.subtitle: I build high-performing engineering teams and scale robust frontend architectures.
Hero.location: Based in Louisville, KY / Available USA

About.title: The Narrative
About.narrative: With fifteen years of software engineering experience, including four years in management at CNET Media Group, I have built a career around delivering scalable, high-performance web applications and establishing robust design systems. I specialize in bridging the gap between product vision and engineering feasibility, utilizing deep expertise in semantic HTML, CSS, TypeScript, and modern component frameworks. As an engineering leader, I focus on empowering high-performing teams through proactive support, mentorship, and streamlined Agile processes that consistently increase team velocity and project delivery

highlight1.title: Engineering Leadership & Mentorship
highlight1.description: I leverage an empowering management philosophy and the GROW framework to coach engineers, resulting in a 50% promotion rate among my direct reports. Additionally, I drive operational efficiency by refining Agile processes, such as streamlining sprint planning to reduce ticket rollover by 20% and improving cross-functional communication with product and design teams.

highlight2.title: Frontend Architecture & Design Systems
highlight2.description: I have extensive experience architecting scalable, reusable component libraries and custom SCSS frameworks across large-scale portfolios, such as replatforming a 12-site network for CBSi. By implementing strict token naming conventions and utilizing frameworks like Vue, I ensure consistent cross-site branding, faster development times, and highly performant, pixel-perfect user experiences.

highlight3.title: Process Optimization & Operational Resilience
highlight3.description: I proactively reduce implementation complexity by negotiating sprint capacity to tackle tech debt and creating automated workflows, such as Slack integrations that cut bug resolution time by 10%. Furthermore, I manage critical system availability by monitoring outage events with tools like New Relic and Pingdom, successfully diagnosing and resolving complex server-side performance issues to minimize downtime.

Contact.title: Let's
Contact.subtitle: Available for engineering manager roles or architectural consulting. Let's build something that sets a new standard.
